questions: fiber connection available ki amader area te?
amar building e connection ache ki?
connection er jonno ki ki lagbe?
referral e apply korle ki discount pabo?
answers: New connection er jonno apnar NID/passport er copy, 1 copy passport size photo, ar ekta utility bill (electricity/gas) lagbe. ISP Digital e apply korun online ba office e eshe!
ISP Digital er coverage check korte amader website e area checker use korun ba 09612-000000 e call korun. Amra Dhaka, Chittagong, Sylhet, Rajshahi shob major city te achi!
Application er por 3-5 working days er moddhe connection hoye jay. Express installation chai le extra 500 taka diye 24 ghontar moddhe connection nite paren!
Installation charge normally 2000 taka (one-time), kintu ekhon promotional offer cholche — FREE installation! Shudhu prothom masher bill advance pay korte hobe. ISP Digital er special deal!
Online apply korte ispdigital.com/new-connection e jan. Form fill up korun, document upload korun, ar payment korun — shob online e! Amader team baki ta korbe.
Apnar building e already ISP Digital er network thakle same-day connection possible! Building check korar jonno amader app e address diye search korun ba call korun.
New connection er full process: 1) Apply (online/office), 2) Document verify, 3) Area survey, 4) Installation schedule, 5) Technician visit, 6) Activation! ISP Digital shob step e update dey.
Referral e apply korle apni ar apnar referrer — dujon e 1 mash free internet paben! Referral code ta application form e diye den. ISP Digital er referral program ta onek popular!
Amader nearest office er location ar contact info er jonno ispdigital.com/locations visit korun. Walk-in customers der jonno kono appointment lagena — office hours e chole ashun!
ISP Digital e new connection er jonno minimum age 18 years hote hobe. Student holeu nite paren — guardian er NID copy shudhu extra lagbe. Process ta onek simple!
